channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: China's U.N. ambassador criticizes US Hormuz resolution - Reuters
item.description:
1. China's U.N. ambassador criticizes US Hormuz resolution  Reuters
  2. Waltz says US pushing for UN resolution on Iranian actions in Strait of Hormuz  The Hill
  3. Iranian UN mission says US seeking cover for ‘aggression’  Middle East Eye
  4. Tehran MP Slams Bahrain as US ‘Puppet’ Over Draft UN Resolution on Strait of Hormuz  WANA News Agency
  5. UN Security Council fails to back resolution aimed at reopening Strait of Hormuz as China and Russia use vetoes  AnewZ

item.title: Former top Russian official admits the country is over Putin and can 'imagine a future without him' - Fortune
item.description:
1. Former top Russian official admits the country is over Putin and can 'imagine a future without him'  Fortune
  2. Former top Russian official admits the country is over Putin and can ‘imagine a future without him’ — even elites bail as Kremlin seizes their assets  Yahoo
  3. Is the tide starting to turn against Putin in Ukraine? ANALYSIS  ABC News - Breaking News, Latest News and Videos
  4. Things are not going so well for Russia  Al Jazeera
  5. Don’t Fall for Rumors of Putin’s Weakness  Foreign Policy

item.title: russia Threatens Kyiv's "Decision-Making Centers" Buried Nearly 100 Meters Underground, but Can It Actually Reach Them? - Defense Express
item.description:
1. russia Threatens Kyiv's "Decision-Making Centers" Buried Nearly 100 Meters Underground, but Can It Actually Reach Them?  Defense Express

  4. Ukraine war live: Zelensky says Russia plans to strike his office and state residence  The Independent
  5. Is Putin’s henchman ready to invade? Ukraine vigilant on Belarus border  The Times

item.title: Vietnam-Bound Supertanker Halted by US Navy Resumes Journey - Bloomberg.com
item.description:
1. Vietnam-Bound Supertanker Halted by US Navy Resumes Journey  Bloomberg.com

  4. Vietnam state oil company urges US Navy to allow tanker through blockade, document shows  Yahoo
  5. Hormuz Oil Flows Creep Higher as More Supertankers Exit  gCaptain

item.title: CBS News anchor Tony Dokoupil barred from broadcasting at Taiwan hotel in latest Asia trip snag - New York Post
item.description:

  4. Exclusive: CBS’ Tony Dokoupil to broadcast from Taiwan after failing to get China visa in time  Semafor

item.title: SR-71 pilot recalls the mission where a Soviet MiG-25 fired a missile at his Blackbird - The Aviation Geek Club
item.description: SR-71 pilot recalls the mission where a Soviet MiG-25 fired a missile at his Blackbird  The Aviation Geek Club

item.title: CBS News insiders fear Bari Weiss will soon enact ‘massive changes’ to 60 Minutes - The Guardian
item.description:
1. CBS News insiders fear Bari Weiss will soon enact ‘massive changes’ to 60 Minutes  The Guardian

item.title: Saudi Arabia and the UAE Bombed Iran for Totally Different Reasons - Zeteo
item.description:
1. Saudi Arabia and the UAE Bombed Iran for Totally Different Reasons  Zeteo
